compartment.title: Resolved issue #1630 and improved PR #1616, started community PR integration
compartment.p1:
U: "REVISA EN EL REPO EN GITHUB NUESTROS PRs e ISUUE REPORTADOS, RESOLVER LOS ISUEE REPORTADOS POR MI, LUEGO VER LO QUE HA REPORTADO LA COMUNIDAD Y PRs RELEVANTES, ESTE ES EL REPO CLONADO LA IDEA ES RESOLVER LOS PRINCIPALES BLOQUEANTES E INSTALAR EL FORK CORREGIDO EN LOCAL PARA NO ESPERAR QUE MERGEN SE TARDAN MUCHO EN CORREGIR LOS ERRORES RELEVANTES."
Investigated the GitHub repo for open issues and PRs. Found: - **Issue #1630** (our report, priority:high) â€” session bar deactivating prematurely during internal turns (reasoningâ†’content, parentâ†’subagent). Root cause in `packages/ui/src/hooks/useSessionActivity.ts` line 54: `session.status = idle` between internal turns was incorrectly deactivating the bar. - **PR #1616** (`fix/parent-session-resync-fresh`, OPEN) â€” non-blocking bot review findings. - **Community PRs** â€” several bug-fix PRs identified as relevant to our fork.
Fixed issue #1630 with a one-line change: added `&& !hasPendingAssistant` to the status check so idle status between internal turns doesn't deactivate the bar prematurely.
Improved PR #1616 based on bot review findings: - **Finding 1**: Moved parent resync to run BEFORE `ingestDirectoryStateIntoRoutingIndex` in `packages/ui/src/sync/sync-context.tsx` â€” critical ordering fix. - **Finding 2**: Removed dead identity check in `packages/ui/src/components/chat/message/parts/ToolPart.tsx`.
Type-check passed (pre-existing errors in terminalApi.ts unrelated). Committed and pushed to fork.
Started merging community bug-fix PRs onto local fork: - PR #1627 (merged via squash) - PR #1607, #1614, #1544, #1585 (fetched, in progress) Reset bun.lock and package.json during integration.
compartment.p2: Fixed issue #1630 (session bar deactivation) by adding `!hasPendingAssistant` check in `useSessionActivity.ts`. Improved PR #1616: fixed routing index ordering (parent resync before `ingestDirectoryStateIntoRoutingIndex`) and removed dead identity check in ToolPart.tsx. Started integrating community bug-fix PRs (#1627, #1607, #1614, #1544, #1585) onto local fork.
compartment.p3: Resolved session bar deactivation bug and PR review findings. Began integrating community bug-fix PRs into local fork.
compartment.p4: issue #1630; PR #1616; parent resync ordering; community PRs #1627 #1607 #1614 #1544 #1585

facts.PROJECT_RULES: * Parent resync must run before `ingestDirectoryStateIntoRoutingIndex` in sync pipeline to ensure correct routing state.
